title: Bamboo Storage Basket, Large
shortDescription: A sturdy, hand-woven bamboo basket for laundry or storage.
description: Hand-woven from split bamboo by artisans in the Dooars region, this basket is sturdy enough for laundry, blankets, or general storage. Approx. 18-inch diameter, 16-inch height. Wipe with a dry cloth; avoid prolonged damp storage.
